name: Scampi-Style Chicken Thighs
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from chicken and rinse with cold water. Pat dry.
2. Place chicken in a shallow container. Pour lemon juice over chicken and let stand 20 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, combine parsley and remaining ingredients; stir well.
4. Spray broiler pan rack with Pam cooking spray.
5. Remove chicken from lemon juice mixture (discard lemon juice).
6. Arrange chicken on the rack and brush with parsley mixture.
7. Broil 6 inches from heating element for 4 minutes on each side or until tender.
8. Transfer chicken to a serving platter. Garnish with lemon wedges and parsley if desired.
Per Serving: 218 calories, 19.4g protein, 14.3g fat, 2g carbohydrates, 70g cholesterol, 1.1mg iron, 100mg sodium, 16mg calcium.
